items.title: Source: Nabers had 'cleanup,' hopeful for Week 1
items.body_text: Malik Nabers underwent a second procedure on his right knee earlier this offseason and the Giants remain hopeful the wide receiver will be ready for Week 1, a source confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Source: Fins make Achane 3rd-highest-paid RB
items.body_text: The Dolphins and De'Von Achane agreed to a four-year contract extension worth $64 million, a source confirmed to ESPN on Wednesday, making him the third-highest-paid running back in the NFL.

items.title: NFL nixed minority offensive asst. mandate in '25
items.body_text: The NFL ended a mandate that all 32 teams hire a minority coach as an offensive assistant ahead of the 2025 season and not because of recent pressure from Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.

items.title: Florida AG continues push against Rooney Rule
items.body_text: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier, who in March threatened potential civil action against the NFL over the Rooney Rule, said Wednesday that he has issued an investigative subpoena to the league.
